description: A sturdy wooden bed frame designed to fit a 6.5 x 6.5 ft (78 x 78 inches) square mattress, with the top of the frame standing exactly 2 feet (24 inches) above the ground.
components: Center Support Rail with Support Legs
notes: The mattress dimensions are 1981.2 mm x 1981.2 mm (6.5 x 6.5 ft). The frame inner cavity is designed at 1990 mm x 1990 mm to allow a 4.4 mm clearance tolerance on all sides. Outer frame thickness uses standard nominal 2-by lumber (38 mm actual thickness). The top surface of the frame is flush at 610 mm (2 ft) height.
